title: Handling Factor Variables in Regression Models
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of identifying, encoding, and interpreting factor (categorical) variables within a linear regression workflow.
elements: Identify Factor Variable (e.g., City, Product Type)
relationships: Process starts with the raw dataset
A categorical column is identified as a factor variable
An appropriate encoding strategy is selected based on the variable's nature
The encoding is applied, transforming categories into numerical values
The model is fit using the transformed design matrix
The model output is interpreted in the context of the chosen encoding scheme
